title: Technoblade Pigs for Faithful 64x
description: Adds the iconic Technoblade crown to pigs while maintaining the pig's texture for Faithful 64x users.
body:
Adds Technoblade’s iconic crown to pigs, styled to match the Faithful 64x texture pack. Requires Entity Model Features or OptiFine, as it uses a second layer for the crown.

Crown model by [TripleLuxen](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/technoblade-pig). If you're not using Faithful, definitely check out their resource pack.

Not using the 64x version of Faithful? Check out the 32x edition [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/technoblade-pigs-for-faithful-32x).

![In-game screenshot with the texture pack; a pig with a crown on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6124dc17e6405bb16155ce69f38968f3c28ad45d_0.webp)
